name: AnySummary
skip_reason: Official website (https://www.anysummary.app) was unreachable across four separate fetch attempts (TLS/certificate errors on every request). Could not verify pricing, features, or claims from the primary source, so no content was generated.

enrichment.short_description: Mem is an AI note-taking app that captures notes, meetings, and web clips, then uses an AI agent to search, organize, and surface relevant context.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Mem is an AI note-taking app that captures ideas and meetings, then uses an AI agent to search, organize, and surface what matters.

features.title: Voice Mode
features.description: Converts spoken thoughts into structured notes.

features.title: Meeting transcription
features.description: Records meetings and automatically generates transcripts and notes.

features.title: Smart search and chat
features.description: Finds information by description and answers questions across saved notes.

features.title: Web Clipper
features.description: Saves web pages into your Mem workspace for later reference.

features.title: Calendar integration
features.description: Syncs meetings and deadlines into your notes.

features.title: Mem Agent
features.description: An AI agent (on the Proactive plan) that learns priorities and sends reminders with context.

pros: Free plan available to try core note-taking and chat features
AI agent can proactively surface reminders and related context, not just passive search
Built-in meeting transcription and calendar sync reduce manual note-taking
Paid plans include email connection and API access
cons: Free plan is capped at 25 notes, 25 chat messages, and 25 PDF pages per month
The Proactive AI agent tier costs $99/month, well above the base Pro tier
No founding year, headquarters, or company size published on the site

faqs.question: Does Mem have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes. The Free plan includes 25 notes, 25 chat messages, and search across 25 PDF pages per month.

faqs.question: What does Mem Pro cost?
faqs.answer: Mem Pro is $12/month and includes unlimited notes, chat, deep search, and PDF understanding.

faqs.question: What is Mem Proactive?
faqs.answer: A $99/month plan, available after a 7-day free trial, that adds an AI agent tracking priorities, decisions, and open loops.

faqs.question: Can Mem transcribe meetings?
faqs.answer: Yes, Mem can record, transcribe, and auto-generate notes from meetings.

use_cases.title: Meeting notes and follow-ups
use_cases.description: Automatically transcribe meetings and generate notes with action items.

use_cases.title: Personal knowledge base
use_cases.description: Capture ideas, web clips, and voice notes in one searchable workspace.

features: Meeting briefings and AI model selection
Mem Agent learns what matters from saved content
Proactive check-ins when action is needed

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Mem?
paragraphs: Mem is a note-taking and knowledge-management app that combines a workspace for notes, meetings, and web clips with an AI agent that helps surface relevant context.
Beyond storage, Mem lets users search and chat across everything they have saved, transcribe meetings automatically, and, on its top plan, receive proactive reminders generated by an AI agent.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Mem is for
paragraphs: Mem is aimed at founders, solopreneurs, consultants, executives, and content creators who want a single searchable place for notes and meeting context, with the option to add an AI agent that tracks priorities for them.

enrichment.short_description: Reflect is a networked, backlinked note-taking app with end-to-end encryption and a GPT-4/Whisper-powered AI assistant for writing and transcription.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Reflect is a networked note-taking app with backlinks, end-to-end encryption, and a GPT-4/Whisper AI assistant for writing and transcription.

features.title: Networked notes
features.description: Backlinked notes let you associate and revisit related ideas.

features.title: AI Assistant
features.description: Powered by GPT-4 and Whisper for writing improvement, transcription, outline generation, and task extraction.

features.title: Cross-device sync
features.description: Real-time synchronization of notes across devices.

features.title: End-to-end encryption
features.description: Notes are encrypted so only the user can access them.

features.title: Web Clipper
features.description: Capture snippets from the browser and Kindle highlights.

features.title: Calendar integration
features.description: Connects with Google Calendar and Outlook to track meetings.

features.title: One-click publishing
features.description: Share individual notes publicly with one click.

pros: Single flat price covers every feature, with no feature-gated tiers
End-to-end encryption for note privacy
Built-in AI assistant for transcription, outlines, and writing help
iOS app supports offline capture
cons: No free plan, only a 14-day free trial
Single pricing tier means no cheaper option for casual users
No Android or native Windows/Linux app mentioned on the site

faqs.question: How much does Reflect cost?
faqs.answer: Reflect is $10/month, billed annually, as a single tier that includes all features.

faqs.question: Is there a free trial?
faqs.answer: Yes, Reflect offers a 14-day free trial.

faqs.question: What AI models power Reflect's assistant?
faqs.answer: Reflect AI uses OpenAI's GPT-4 and Whisper for writing help, transcription, and summarization.

faqs.question: What platforms does Reflect support?
faqs.answer: Web, iOS, and macOS, with Chrome and Safari browser extensions.

use_cases.title: Personal knowledge management
use_cases.description: Connect notes and ideas over time using backlinks and search.

use_cases.title: Meeting and voice notes
use_cases.description: Transcribe voice notes and meetings and turn them into structured text.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Reflect?
paragraphs: Reflect is a networked note-taking app that uses backlinks to connect related notes into a personal knowledge base, sometimes described as a "second brain".
It adds an AI assistant built on GPT-4 and Whisper for tasks like transcribing voice notes, generating outlines, and improving writing, alongside end-to-end encryption and calendar integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Reflect is for
paragraphs: Reflect is built for researchers, writers, and knowledge workers who want to connect ideas across notes over time and are comfortable paying a single flat monthly price for a fully-featured, encrypted note-taking tool.

enrichment.short_description: Taskade is an AI-native workspace for notes, tasks, and real-time collaboration that also lets users build and deploy AI agents and automations.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Taskade is an AI-native workspace for notes, tasks, and collaboration, with deployable AI agents and automations, from a free plan to enterprise.

features.title: AI-generated apps
features.description: Turns a prompt into dashboards, CRMs, client portals, and trackers with databases and automations wired together.

features.title: Deployable AI agents
features.description: Agents with persistent memory, custom tools, and built-in integrations.

features.title: Automation workflows
features.description: Durable workflows with branching, looping, and retries across 100+ integrations.

features.title: Live dashboards
features.description: Real-time KPI trackers and analytics views.

features.title: Multi-model AI access
features.description: Routes across 15+ frontier models from OpenAI, Anthropic, and Google on paid plans.

features.title: Templates
features.description: Access to 500+ community templates that can be cloned and customized.

pros: Free plan available with no time limit
Wide platform support: web, Mac, Windows, iOS, and Android
Access to multiple frontier AI models (GPT, Claude, Gemini) on paid plans
Large integration library covering 100+ third-party apps
cons: Free plan is limited to a single user and 3,000 one-time AI credits
Heavier AI usage requires moving to higher-priced tiers for more monthly credits
Removing Taskade branding requires the Pro plan or above

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Taskade's Free plan is $0/month with 3 deployable apps and 3,000 one-time AI credits.

faqs.question: What does the Pro plan cost?
faqs.answer: Pro is $16/month and includes 50,000 monthly AI credits and unlimited AI agents and automations.

faqs.question: What platforms does Taskade support?
faqs.answer: Web browsers plus native apps for iOS, Android, Mac, and Windows.

faqs.question: Can I build apps without code?
faqs.answer: Yes, Taskade can generate dashboards, CRMs, and trackers from a single prompt without engineering resources.

use_cases.title: Team task and project management
use_cases.description: Organize tasks, docs, and projects with real-time collaboration.

use_cases.title: No-code internal tools
use_cases.description: Generate business apps like CRMs and trackers from a prompt.

use_cases.title: AI-driven automations
use_cases.description: Deploy agents and workflows that connect to 100+ integrations.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Taskade?
paragraphs: Taskade is an AI-native workspace combining notes, task management, and real-time team collaboration with the ability to generate and deploy AI agents and automations.
Its "Genesis" capability can turn a single prompt into a working app — such as a dashboard, CRM, or client portal — with a database, AI agents, and automations already connected.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Taskade is for
paragraphs: Taskade targets founders, marketing teams, agencies, and product teams who want to manage projects and also build lightweight internal tools or automations without hiring engineers.

enrichment.short_description: Voicenotes is an AI notetaking app that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings and voice memos without a bot joining the call.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Voicenotes is an AI notetaking app that records, transcribes, and summarizes meetings and voice memos, then lets you ask AI across your history.

features.title: Bot-free meeting capture
features.description: Records and summarizes meetings on Zoom, Microsoft Teams, Google Meet, Webex, and Slack without a bot joining the call.

features.title: Ask AI
features.description: Query your entire meeting history for instant answers.

features.title: Multi-language transcription
features.description: Transcribes in 100+ languages with automatic language detection.

features.title: Export and sharing
features.description: Export clean PDFs or share summaries directly to Slack.

features.title: MCP integration
features.description: Voicenotes MCP connects to Claude, ChatGPT, and other AI platforms (Pro plan).

features.title: Cross-platform recording
features.description: Available on macOS, Windows, iOS, Android, watchOS, and Wear OS.

pros: Free Basic plan includes unlimited recordings and 100 weekly transcription minutes
Works without inviting a bot into meetings
Broad platform coverage, including watchOS and Wear OS
States SOC 2 Type II certification and that data isn't used to train AI models
cons: Free plan limited to 100 weekly transcription minutes and 30-day history
Advanced integrations (Zapier, Obsidian, Notion) require the paid Pro plan
Team pricing requires a sales demo rather than public self-serve pricing

faqs.question: What does the free Basic plan include?
faqs.answer: Unlimited recordings, 100 weekly transcription minutes, support for 100+ languages, and 30-day history.

faqs.question: How much does Voicenotes Pro cost?
faqs.answer: $9 per user per month, with unlimited recording/transcription and permanent searchable history.

faqs.question: Does Voicenotes need a bot in my meetings?
faqs.answer: No, it captures meetings without a bot joining the call.

faqs.question: Is Voicenotes secure?
faqs.answer: The site states it is SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR compliant, and that data isn't used to train AI models.

use_cases.title: Meeting summaries and action items
use_cases.description: Automatically capture and summarize meetings across common video call tools.

use_cases.title: Voice memo capture
use_cases.description: Record and transcribe personal voice notes for later search.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Voicenotes?
paragraphs: Voicenotes is an AI notetaking app that automatically captures, transcribes, and summarizes meetings and voice memos, and lets users ask questions across their full meeting history.
It connects to common meeting platforms without requiring a bot to join the call, and supports transcription in 100+ languages.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Voicenotes is for
paragraphs: Voicenotes is aimed at professionals and teams — across sales, engineering, product, and investor relations — who want automatic meeting notes and a searchable archive without manual note-taking.

enrichment.short_description: Fliki turns scripts, blog posts, and ideas into finished videos with AI voiceovers in 2,000+ voices, AI avatars, and translation into 80+ languages.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Fliki turns text and blog posts into videos with AI voiceovers, avatars, and translation into 80+ languages, with a free plan available.

features.title: Text-to-video
features.description: Converts scripts or prompts into complete videos with voiceover, visuals, and subtitles.

features.title: AI voiceover
features.description: 2,000+ voices across 80+ languages, including ultra-realistic options.

features.title: Digital twin avatars
features.description: Creates an AI avatar of the user for consistent on-camera presentation.

features.title: Blog-to-video and PPT-to-video
features.description: Repurposes existing articles or PowerPoint slides into narrated videos.

features.title: Voice cloning
features.description: Record a sample to create a personal AI voice.

features.title: Translation and dubbing
features.description: Localizes videos into 80+ languages.

features.title: Direct publishing
features.description: Publishes videos directly to TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube.

pros: Free forever plan available with no credit card required
Very large voice library (2,000+ voices) and broad language coverage
Supports multiple source formats: scripts, blog posts, and slide decks
Direct publishing to social platforms from within the app
cons: Free plan videos are capped at 1 minute, 720p, and include a Fliki watermark
Exact monthly prices for paid Standard and Premium plans are not shown as static text on the pricing page
No dedicated iOS, Android, Mac, or Windows apps mentioned — web-based only

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Fliki has a free-forever plan with 36 credits per month, 1-minute exports, and 720p resolution, with a watermark.

faqs.question: What languages does Fliki support?
faqs.answer: Fliki supports 300+ voices across 80+ languages on the free plan, expanding to 1,000+ and 2,000+ voices on paid plans.

faqs.question: Can Fliki turn a blog post into a video?
faqs.answer: Yes, its blog-to-video workflow repurposes articles into narrated videos.

faqs.question: Does Fliki offer voice cloning?
faqs.answer: Yes, paid plans include voice cloning by recording a voice sample.

use_cases.title: Social video creation
use_cases.description: Turn ideas or scripts into short-form videos for TikTok, YouTube, or Reels.

use_cases.title: Content repurposing
use_cases.description: Convert existing blog posts or slide decks into narrated videos.

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Fliki?
paragraphs: Fliki is an AI video creation platform that converts text, scripts, blog posts, and slide decks into finished videos complete with AI voiceovers, visuals, and subtitles.
It includes a large library of AI voices and avatars, voice cloning, and translation into 80+ languages, along with direct publishing to platforms like YouTube and TikTok.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Fliki is for
paragraphs: Fliki is used by individual content creators, businesses, and learning-and-development teams who want to produce narrated video content from existing text without filming or hiring voice talent.

enrichment.short_description: Colossyan is an AI video platform that turns company knowledge into avatar-led training videos and courses with quizzes, translation, and SCORM export.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Colossyan turns knowledge into avatar-led training videos and courses, with quizzes, translation into 100+ languages, and SCORM export for LMS.

features.title: AI avatar video generation
features.description: 300+ AI avatars and voiceovers for presenter-led videos.

features.title: Course creation
features.description: Combine videos, text, and interactions into structured training programs.

features.title: Interactive elements
features.description: Branching scenarios, quizzes, and assessments embedded in videos.

features.title: Localization
features.description: Automated translation into 100+ languages.

features.title: LMS/SCORM export
features.description: Export courses in SCORM format for learning management systems.

features.title: Voice cloning
features.description: Create a custom AI voice for narration.

features.title: Custom/branded avatars
features.description: Enterprise option to build a branded custom avatar.

pros: Free Starter tier available with no credit card required
SCORM export for direct integration with learning management systems
Built-in quizzes and branching scenarios for interactive training
SOC 2 Type II and GDPR compliance stated on the site
cons: Free/entry Starter tier caps video minutes per month (20 minutes with the NEO avatar)
Watermark removal and MP4 downloads require the Professional plan or above
Enterprise pricing is custom/quote-only

faqs.question: Does Colossyan have a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Starter tier is free with a limited monthly avatar-minute allowance and no credit card required.

faqs.question: What does the Professional plan cost?
faqs.answer: $59/month (with an annual discount), including unlimited MP4 downloads and watermark removal.

faqs.question: Can Colossyan videos be translated?
faqs.answer: Yes, it supports automated translation into 100+ languages.

faqs.question: Can courses be exported to an LMS?
faqs.answer: Yes, Colossyan supports SCORM export for learning management systems.

use_cases.title: Employee and compliance training
use_cases.description: Produce avatar-led training videos and courses with quizzes.

use_cases.title: Sales enablement content
use_cases.description: Create localized product and onboarding videos at scale.

features: 30 min/month with NEO, 10 min/month with NEO2

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Colossyan?
paragraphs: Colossyan is an AI video platform that turns organizational knowledge into training videos and courses, combining AI avatars, voiceovers, interactivity, and localization in one workspace.
Courses can include quizzes and branching scenarios, and export to SCORM format for delivery through a learning management system.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Colossyan is for
paragraphs: Colossyan targets HR, compliance, and sales enablement teams at organizations that need to produce and localize training content at scale without video production crews.

enrichment.short_description: Elai is an AI video platform that turns scripts, slide decks, and articles into presenter-led videos using AI avatars, voice cloning, and translation.
enrichment.seo_meta_description: Elai turns scripts, slides, and articles into presenter-led videos with 80+ AI avatars, voice cloning, and translation into 75+ languages.

features.title: AI avatars
features.description: 80+ ready-made avatars, with options to create custom avatars.

features.title: Voice cloning
features.description: Clone a voice across 28 languages.

features.title: Multilingual narration
features.description: 75+ languages and 450+ accents supported.

features.title: PPTX-to-video and article-to-video
features.description: Converts PowerPoint presentations or blog/article URLs into narrated videos.

features.title: Avatar dialogs
features.description: Scenario-based videos with multiple avatars for training.

features.title: Automated translation
features.description: Translates finished videos for global audiences.

features.title: API access
features.description: API for custom integrations.

pros: Free plan available for creating a 1-minute video
Large avatar and language library (80+ avatars, 75+ languages)
Article-to-video and PPTX-to-video workflows for reusing existing content
API available for custom integrations
cons: Free plan limited to 1 minute of video
Selfie avatars and voice cloning are paid add-ons on lower tiers ($199-$200/year)
Web-based only — no dedicated mobile or desktop apps mentioned

faqs.question: Is there a free plan?
faqs.answer: Yes, Elai's Free plan allows creating 1 minute of video with access to its avatar and language library.

faqs.question: How much does the Creator plan cost?
faqs.answer: $29/month ($23/month billed annually) for 15 minutes of video per month in Full HD.

faqs.question: Does Elai support voice cloning?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Team plan includes 1 voice clone, with additional cloning available as a paid add-on.

faqs.question: Where is Elai based?
faqs.answer: Elai lists an address at 600 River Avenue, Suite 100, Pittsburgh, PA, USA.

use_cases.title: Corporate training videos
use_cases.description: Turn slide decks or scripts into avatar-led training content.

use_cases.title: Marketing and product videos
use_cases.description: Convert articles or scripts into narrated videos for campaigns.

features: 1 selfie avatar and 1 voice clone included

long_form_blocks.heading: What is Elai?
paragraphs: Elai is an AI video generation platform that creates presenter-led videos from typed scripts, uploaded slide decks, or article URLs, using AI avatars and voiceovers.
It supports voice cloning, multilingual narration and translation, and an API for embedding video generation into other workflows.

long_form_blocks.heading: Who Elai is for
paragraphs: Elai is aimed at L&D, corporate communications, customer education, and marketing teams that need to produce training or explainer videos repeatedly without on-camera talent.

name: DeepBrain AI
skip_reason: The listed website (https://www.deepbrain.io) now issues a permanent 301 redirect to https://aistudios.com — DeepBrain AI has rebranded its product to "AI Studios". Since the DB entry's name/slug no longer matches the live product's current branding, no content was generated under the old name to avoid a mismatch; this should be re-reviewed as a rebrand/rename rather than a standard enrichment.

name: Hour One
skip_reason: Official website (https://hourone.ai) was unreachable across repeated fetch attempts (connection refused on every request, including the /pricing path and a www variant). Could not verify facts from the primary source, so no content was generated.
